eventName: Prompt Engineering vs Context Engineering: What Actually Works
description: A lively talk-and-panel evening exploring the shift from prompt engineering to context engineering. We'll compare approaches, share real-world case studies, and debate what matters most when building production AI systems.
targetAudience: AI practitioners and developers curious about moving beyond prompt tricks

suggestedSpeakers.name: Marcus Johnson
suggestedSpeakers.reason: Prompt engineering is his specialty and he excels at making concepts accessible. 25 talks of experience.

suggestedSpeakers.name: Elena Vasquez
suggestedSpeakers.reason: Her AI UX and product design perspective bridges the gap between prompting techniques and user outcomes.

suggestedSpeakers.name: Alex Rivera
suggestedSpeakers.reason: Brings the production deployment angle — what actually works vs what looks good in demos.

suggestedVenue.name: Downtown Tech Hub
suggestedVenue.reason: Open floor plan and 80-person capacity fits the 50 estimate with room for walk-ins. Great AV for talks.
